caption: The video appears to be a screen recording of an online presentation or lecture, likely focused on systems thinking and modeling. The presenter, Gene Bellinger, is visible in a small window on the right side of the screen, wearing headphones and speaking. The main content displayed is a visual map or diagram with various interconnected nodes, each representing different concepts such as "developing models," "model & play," and "share." These nodes are connected by lines, suggesting relationships or processes between them. A central image emphasizes the concept of sharing, featuring hands and other symbols that convey collaboration and communication. The overall theme seems to revolve around the development and sharing of models within a systems framework, possibly for educational or professional purposes. The background includes multiple browser tabs, indicating that the presenter might be referencing additional resources during the presentation.
